positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical illustration of a cosmic nebula merging with classical botanical elements. The central subject is a majestic, stylized owl perched on a crescent moon, framed by blooming bioluminescent flora and delicate, swirling galaxies. The color palette should feature deep indigo, ethereal lavender, shimmering gold accents, and pops of cyan. Style should be a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and cosmic surrealism, rendered with intricate linework, crisp silhouettes, and strong, dramatic contrast. Composition must be centered and repeatable for apparel printing. Clean vector-art quality, ultra-detailed, high resolution, matte finish.
negative: blurry, grain, noise, low detail, artifacts, text, signature, logo, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, bad composition
